trends.label: [REDDIT EXCLUSIVE]
trends.context: Users are shifting away from complex routines to simpler, more effective hair styling techniques.
trends.result: Damp styling provides superior definition and manageability for curly hair textures.

trends.label: [INGREDIENT BREAKOUT]
trends.context: High-volume sales for face washes combining salicylic acid with niacinamide for acne-prone skin.
trends.result: Dual-action cleansers effectively target breakouts while brightening and soothing skin barriers.

trends.label: [CROSS-PLATFORM]
trends.context: Dedicated platforms and services are normalizing professional grooming routines for Indian men.
trends.result: Increased consumer demand for specialized beard care and professional salon-at-home services.

trends.label: [GOOGLE/SOCIAL]
trends.context: Beauty discourse is moving beyond 'glass skin' to prioritize visible, natural skin textures.
trends.result: Shift toward authentic, raw skin finishes over heavy, filtered makeup looks.

trends.label: [INSTAGRAM BUZZ]
trends.context: Users are seeking rapid, no-bleach hair color solutions for immediate grey coverage.
trends.result: High interest in time-efficient, low-damage hair transformation products for busy lifestyles.
